items.title: Alibaba reports Q4 revenue up 3% YoY to ~$35.8B, below ~$36.3B est., and net income up ~100% to ~$3.7B, in part due to investments, as it seeks to monetize AI (Luz Ding/Bloomberg)

items.title: Tencent reports Q1 revenue up 9% YoY to ~$28.9B, below ~$29.4B est., and net income of ~$8.5B, meeting est., amid a costly AI pivot; its stock is down 23% YTD (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Tencent reports Q1 revenue up 9% YoY to ~$28.9B, below ~$29.4B est., and net income of ~$8.5B, meeting est., amid a costly AI pivot; its stock is down 23% YTD (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Tencent reports Q1 revenue up 9% YoY to ~$28.9B, below ~$29.4B est., and net income of ~$8.5B, meeting est., amid a costly AI pivot; its stock is down 23% YTD (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 腾讯报告称，在成本高昂的人工智能转型过程中，第一季度收入同比增长 9% 至约 $28.9B，低于约 $29.4B 预期，净利润约 $8.5B，符合预期；其股价年初至今下跌 23%（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 腾讯报告称，在成本高昂的人工智能转型过程中，第一季度收入同比增长 9% 至约 $28.9B，低于约 $29.4B 预期，净利润约 $8.5B，符合预期；其股价年初至今下跌 23%（彭博社） / Tencent reports Q1 revenue up 9% YoY to ~$28.9B, below ~$29.4B est., and net income of ~$8.5B, meeting est., amid a costly AI pivot; its stock is down 23% YTD (Bloomberg)

items.title: SoftBank reports Q4 net income up 3x to ~$11.6B, above ~$1.5B est., driven by a $25B gain in its OpenAI stake; by October, its OpenAI investment will hit $64.6B (David Keohane/Financial Times)
